CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Smith (415-294-1465) for Plaintiff/opposing party MAPLE D RABB
Stuart R. Curran (415-509-7720) for Defendant/Moving party GEORGE SANTOS COLORADO.

Hearing is held. PL argues re: knowledge. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GEORGE SANTOS COLORADO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross Complaint is GRANTED. Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith.. Order (approved by pl) is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAPLE RABB's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to sustain her burden under CCP 564(b)(1) or (9). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
